---
title: "test_validate_phrases.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_validate_phrases.py"
loc: 61
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 7.96
overall_score: 5.28
---

## Intent
The `test_validate_phrases.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_phrases_yaml, test_validate_phrases_valid, test_validate_phrases_invalid_odin, test_validate_phrases_missing_tags, test_validate_phrases_missing_file. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_phrases_yaml, test_validate_phrases_valid, test_validate_phrases_invalid_odin, test_validate_phrases_missing_tags, test_validate_phrases_missing_file. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [yaml](file://yaml)
- [scripts.validate_phrases](file://scripts.validate_phrases)

### Exports
- `mock_phrases_yaml`
- `test_validate_phrases_valid`
- `test_validate_phrases_invalid_odin`
- `test_validate_phrases_missing_tags`
- `test_validate_phrases_missing_file`
